description: VeltrixDB — every metric: write/read/delete paths, LIRS cache, VLog GC, scrubber, cluster, replication, failure detection, Go runtime, system memory, CPU iowait, per-disk NVMe I/O.
title: VeltrixDB — Complete Metrics Dashboard

panels.title: Bloom Filter: False Positives vs. Shortcuts
Bloom Filter False Positive Rate (FP / total probes)
Cache Evictions by Type (LIRS / TTL / Defrag)
VLog Garbage Ratio per Disk (>30% triggers GC, >65% EMERGENCY)
VLog Disk Latency EWMA per Disk (α=1/8)
Slow Disk Detection (1 = this disk ≥5× cluster median latency)
VLog GC Runs/s (incl. EMERGENCY — persists = overloaded)
GC Skip Reasons (why GC is not making progress)
GC CAS Fails & Read Errors (contention & corruption signals)
🔴 Scrub Corruption Rate — ANY value = silent disk corruption
Atomic Ops Rate (CAS / INCR / DECR / SETNX)
Node Count & Partition Map Version Over Time
Failure Detector: Detections / Recoveries / False Positives
Go GC — Pause Time Rate & Cycle Rate
System Memory (total / available / buffers / page cache)
CPU I/O Wait Fraction per CPU (high = disk contention)
NVMe Read & Write IOPS per Device
NVMe Read & Write Throughput per Device (bytes/s)
NVMe I/O Queue Depth (IOs in flight) per Device
NVMe Average Read Latency per Device (ms)
NVMe Average Write Latency per Device (ms)
